overall.description: A cinematic first-person walkthrough of a luxurious modern penthouse interior from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring minimalist dark architecture, an indoor water feature with rock formations, and a dramatic floating staircase with red accent lighting. The camera moves smoothly from the sunlit ground floor lobby up to an upper corridor with glass ceiling panels.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury penthouse lobby with indoor water feature

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the polished wooden floor toward the floating staircase at the far end of the lobby

entered.detail: rectangular shallow pool with reflective water surface in the center of the lobby
large sculptural rocks placed in the water feature near the far wall
large grid-patterned glass ceiling panels allowing natural sunlight to flood the space
dramatic cantilevered staircase with open risers ascending to the upper level
dark reflective wooden flooring covering the lobby area

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a spacious, minimalist luxury penthouse lobby with high ceilings and dramatic natural lighting from glass skylights above. The camera moves forward across polished wooden floors toward a central water feature with decorative rocks, while a floating staircase with red accents becomes visible on the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed floating staircase with accent lighting

events.description: begins ascending the floating staircase, transitioning from horizontal walking to vertical climbing

agents.ego_description: climbing the floating staircase, with red-lit steps passing beneath as the camera moves upward through the stairwell

entered.detail: individual stair steps illuminated with red LED accent lighting on the edges
tall dark paneled walls enclosing the stairwell with minimal reflective surfaces

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the open lobby into the enclosed floating staircase, ascending the red-lit wooden steps. The environment becomes darker and more confined, with dark paneled walls and vertical slit windows passing by as the camera climbs toward the upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level corridor with glass ceiling overlooking outdoor terrace

events.description: exits the enclosed stairwell onto the sunlit upper corridor with glass ceiling and outdoor views

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper corridor toward an elevator door, passing glass railings overlooking the lower level and palm trees visible outside

entered.detail: transparent grid-patterned glass ceiling panels allowing direct sunlight into the corridor
transparent glass safety railing overlooking the lower floor lobby
tropical palm trees visible through the open exterior wall beyond the railing
dark wood-paneled elevator door with metal frame and call button panel

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the staircase, the scene opens into a sunlit upper corridor with a glass grid ceiling casting geometric shadows on the dark floor. The camera walks past glass railings revealing outdoor palm trees and a distant cityscape, approaching a wood-paneled elevator door at the corridor's end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a minimalist luxury penthouse that transitions from a bright, open lobby into a moody staircase before emerging into a sunlit upper gallery. It begins by gliding across polished wooden floors toward a central water feature and decorative rocks, with a red-accented floating staircase appearing on the right. As the camera enters the staircase, the environment shifts from the airy lobby to a darker, more confined space, ascending red-lit wooden steps past dark paneled walls and vertical slit windows. The scene then opens into a bright upper corridor where a glass grid ceiling casts geometric shadows across the floor. Finally, the camera moves past glass railings overlooking palm trees and a distant cityscape, heading toward a wood-paneled elevator door at the end of the hall.
